---
title: "make_viirs_netpp_monthly.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../viirs-netpp.html)

Monthly Net Primary Productivity generation.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/viirs-netpp/scripts/make_viirs_netpp_monthly.py >}}
```

:::
